name: action-sheet-menu
description: A contextual menu panel composed of grouped ActionSheet_Item rows, optional section titles, and separator lines. Supports three layout types: Default (icon + label + secondary icon), Checkbox (checkbox row layout), and Flat (icon + label + secondary icon, no section headers).

reuses.notes: Repeated for each list item row in default and flat types.
Used in checkbox type — each row wraps a Checkbox instance.

gaps.notes: Separator component (Figma node 282:849) is not yet registered as a standalone klp component. Inlined as <hr> with border-klp-border-default styling.
